glosses.ja: 流行; ファッション

sentences.target: La moda cambia muy rápido hoy.

translations.es: La moda cambia muy rápido hoy.
translations.fr: La mode change très vite aujourd'hui.
translations.de: Die Mode ändert sich heute sehr schnell.
translations.it: La moda cambia molto in fretta oggi.
translations.pt: A moda muda muito rápido hoje.
translations.vi: Thời trang thay đổi rất nhanh hôm nay.
translations.hu: A divat ma nagyon gyorsan változik.
translations.hi: आज फैशन बहुत तेजी से बदलता है।
translations.pl: Moda zmienia się dziś bardzo szybko.
translations.el: Η μόδα αλλάζει πολύ γρήγορα σήμερα.
translations.nb: Moten endrer seg veldig raskt i dag.
translations.id: Mode berubah sangat cepat hari ini.
translations.sv: Modet förändras খুব snabbt i dag.
translations.ro: Moda se schimbă foarte repede azi.
translations.cs: Móda se dnes mění velmi rychle.
translations.da: Mode ændrer sig meget দ্রুত i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はファッションがとても速く変わります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article modifying the noun 'moda'; feminine singular agreement.
Common noun, singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb in present indicative, third person singular.
Degree adverb modifying 'rápido'.
Adverbial modifier describing how the change happens.
Temporal adverb indicating time.

sentences.target: Mi hermana sigue la moda nueva.

translations.es: Mi hermana sigue la moda nueva.
translations.en: My sister follows the new fashion.
translations.fr: Ma sœur suit la nouvelle mode.
translations.de: Meine Schwester folgt der neuen Mode.
translations.it: Mia sorella segue la nuova moda.
translations.ru: Моя сестра следит за новой модой.
translations.pt: Minha irmã segue a nova moda.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim yeni modayı takip ediyor.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi theo kịp mốt mới.
translations.nl: Mijn zus volgt de nieuwe mode.
translations.uk: Моя сестра стежить за новою модою.
translations.hu: A húgom követi az új divatot.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन नए फैशन को अपनाती है।
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου ακολουθεί τη νέα μόδα.
translations.nb: Søsteren min følger den nye moten.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya mengikuti mode baru.
translations.sv: Min syster följer det nya modet.
translations.da: Min søster følger den nye mode.
translations.ja: 妹は新しい流行を追っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'hermana'.
Common noun, singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb in present indicative, third person singular.
Definite article modifying 'moda'.
Common noun, singular; direct object of 'sigue'.
Adjective modifying 'moda'; feminine singular agreement.

translations.en: I don't understand that weird fashion.
translations.fr: Je ne comprends pas cette mode bizarre.
translations.de: Ich verstehe diese seltsame Mode nicht.
translations.ko: 나는 저 이상한 유행을 이해하지 못해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不理解那种奇怪的时尚。
translations.yue: 我唔明嗰種奇怪嘅潮流。
translations.ru: Я не понимаю эту странную моду.
translations.pt: Eu não entendo essa moda estranha.
translations.he: אני לא מבין את האפנה המוזרה הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi không hiểu mốt kỳ lạ đó.
translations.nl: Ik begrijp die vreemde mode niet.
translations.uk: Я не розумію ту дивну моду.
translations.hu: Nem értem azt a furcsa divatot.
translations.hi: मैं उस अजीब फैशन को नहीं समझता।
translations.el: Δεν καταλαβαίνω αυτή την παράξενη μόδα.
translations.nb: Jeg forstår ikke den rare moten.
translations.id: Saya tidak mengerti mode aneh itu.
translations.sv: Jag förstår inte det där konstiga modet.
translations.da: Jeg forstår ikke den mærkelige mode.
translations.ja: あの変な流行がわかりません。

tokens.explanation: Negation particle modifying the verb phrase.
Main verb in present indicative, first person singular.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'moda'.
Common noun, singular; direct object of 'entiendo'.
Adjective modifying 'moda'; feminine singular agreement.

sentences.target: En mi barrio, la moda vuelve.

translations.es: En mi barrio, la moda vuelve.
translations.en: In my neighborhood, fashion comes back.
translations.fr: Dans mon quartier, la mode revient.
translations.de: In meiner Nachbarschaft kommt die Mode zurück.
translations.it: Nel mio quartiere la moda torna.
translations.zh-Hans: 在我家附近，时尚又回来了。
translations.yue: 喺我屋企附近，潮流又返嚟。
translations.pt: No meu bairro, a moda volta.
translations.vi: Ở khu tôi, mốt lại quay về.
translations.nl: In mijn buurt komt de mode terug.
translations.hi: मेरे मोहल्ले में फैशन वापस आता है।
translations.el: Στη γειτονιά μου, η μόδα επιστρέφει.
translations.nb: I nabolaget mitt kommer moten tilbake.
translations.id: Di lingkungan saya, mode kembali lagi.
translations.sv: I mitt kvarter kommer modet tillbaka.
translations.cs: V mé čtvrti se móda vrací.
translations.da: I mit kvarter kommer moden tilbage.
translations.ja: 私の近所では、流行がまた戻ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing the locative phrase 'mi barrio'.
Possessive determiner modifying 'barrio'.
Common noun, singular within a prepositional phrase.
Definite article modifying 'moda'.
Common noun, singular; subject of 'vuelve'.
Main verb in present indicative, third person singular.
